nasb.text: ‘You shall not hate your fellow countryman in your heart; you may surely reprove your neighbor, but shall not incur sin because of him.

esv.text: “You shall not hate your brother in your heart, but you shall reason frankly with your neighbor, lest you incur sin because of him.

cnv.text: “你不可心裡恨你的兄弟；應坦誠責備你的鄰舍，免得你因他擔當罪過。

ccb.text: 对同胞不可心中怀恨。同胞有错，要当面指正，免得自己因他而担罪。
